headline: Orkin Mosquito List Puts Public Health Focus On Rollins Valuation Story
summary: Orkin, a subsidiary of Rollins (NYSE:ROL), released its 2026 Mosquito Cities List, spotlighting shifting mosquito activity across major U.S. cities. The company also expanded its public health partnership with the American Red Cross, extending outreach around mosquito awareness and prevention. For you as an investor, this update sits at the intersection of public health and pest control services, where Rollins has built its business through brands like Orkin. The new Mosquito Cities List...
